nodes.categoryHTML:
Libraries

Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters
nodes.itemHTML: • libadalangstars93 - Libadalang is a library for parsing and semantic analysis of Ada code. It is meant as a building block for integration into other tools (IDE, static analyzers, etc).
• protobuf-adastars8 - Experimantal Ada code generation support for Google Protocol Buffers.
• adaglstars5 - Multiplatform Ada/OpenGL bindings (ported to native/OpenGL, A2JS/WebGL and WASM/WebGL).
• ada-vscodestars1 - Basic syntax highlighting for Ada and GPR.
• ncurses-ada95 - Ada95 bindings for ncurses.
• record-fluxstars56 - RecordFlux: Toolset for the formal specification of messages and the generation of verifiable binary parsers and message generators in SPARK.
• ada-crypto-librarystars83 - This is a crypto library for Ada with a nice API and is written for the i386 and x86_64 hardware architecture.
• spark-naclstars43 - SPARK 2014 re-implementation of the TweetNaCl crypto library.
• xml-ez - Library for emitting XML from Ada programs.
• axmppstars7 - With the AXMPP library you can connect to a Jabber server to send and receive messages.
• zanyblue - An Ada package allowing the externalization of application messages into a properties file.
• a-stream-toolsstars1 - Stream utilities for Ada2005 and 2012.

• micro-tem-pistars2 - Raspberry Pi using a BBC Micro:Bit as temperature sensor.
• covid-19-simulatorstars9 - Multi engine/algorithms COVID-19 simulator. Ada, Qt code under the hood.

• ada-magic - SofCheck AdaMagic is ACATS validated and certified Ada compiler targeting C and/or C++ (4 command line switches for fine tuning). ObjectAda and several other commercial compilers share engine with AdaMagic. MapuSoft distributes AdaMagic as integral component of AppCOE.
• Copybara Actionstars46 - Move and transform code between repositories (ideal to maintain several repos from one monorepo).
